common.disclaimer: This site is an LCK fan page. It is not affiliated with Riot Games or LCK, and provides simulation content based on match data only.

home.subtitleLine1: Build the optimal 8-player roster within a limited budget
home.subtitleLine2: A ranking race based on real LCK performance

registerTeam.introLine2: Enter a team name to join the league.
registerTeam.alertProfanity: Names containing profanity are not allowed.
registerTeam.doneDesc: Next, register your starting lineup for this week's matches. Starters can be changed weekly.

myTeam.rankDescLine2: Check your team's rank on the leaderboard.

withdraw.descLine1: Let us know why you're leaving —
withdraw.descLine2: it helps us make LFM better.
withdraw.reason2: The site is hard to use
withdraw.notePlaceholder: Feel free to leave any additional feedback (optional)
withdraw.warningPrefix: Withdrawing will immediately delete all your data, including your roster and rankings, and
withdraw.errorGeneric: An error occurred while processing your withdrawal.

leaderboard.noHistory: No participation record for this round
leaderboard.tallyingDescLine1: Once all matches in this round
leaderboard.tallyingDescLine2: are finished, rankings will be revealed

info.rankInfoDesc: Player rankings calculated from real LCK match records.
info.rowsEmpty: No players in your roster for this position

privacyPolicy.intro: LFM (the "Service") values users' personal information and complies with the Personal Information Protection Act and other relevant laws. This Privacy Policy is written to transparently explain what personal information the Service collects, why it is used, and how long it is retained.
privacyPolicy.section1Title: 1. Purpose of Collecting and Using Personal Information
privacyPolicy.section1Body: The Service collects the minimum personal information necessary for member management and service provision. Collected information is not used for any purpose other than the following.
privacyPolicy.section1Item1: Membership registration and identification: creating an account and authenticating login to distinguish users
privacyPolicy.section2Body: The Service collects the following personal information.
privacyPolicy.section2Item2: Automatically collected: service usage records, cookies, and access IP information (for service optimization and fraud prevention)
privacyPolicy.section3Body: User personal information is, in principle, retained until account withdrawal and is destroyed without delay once its purpose has been fulfilled.
privacyPolicy.section3Item1: Destruction procedure: upon a withdrawal request, the collected email information is immediately and permanently deleted from the database in an unrecoverable manner.
privacyPolicy.section3Item2: Exceptions: where retention is required by applicable law, the information is securely stored for the period required by that law before being destroyed.
privacyPolicy.section4Body: The Service does not provide or share users' personal information with external parties. If outsourcing becomes necessary in the future for stable service operations (e.g. an email delivery system), we will provide advance notice through this policy.
privacyPolicy.section5Body: Users may check or update their personal information (email) at any time, and may withdraw their consent to the collection and use of personal information by deleting their account.

scorePolicy.section1Body: Calculated based on real match records (Player Stats).
scorePolicy.section1Note: When building your roster, players are priced based on their average score from last season.
scorePolicy.section3Body: A user's ranking score is calculated as the average of the actual scores of the 5 players registered as the starting squad.
scorePolicy.section3Formula: Sum of the 5 starting squad players' scores ÷ 5
